requirement_topic.en: KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVOC) — Mandatory Pre-Shipment Inspection
requirement_topic.zh: KEBS出口前符合性验证（PVOC）——强制装船前检验
requirement_topic.zht: KEBS出口前符合性驗證（PVOC）——強制裝船前檢驗

summary.en: The Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) requires a mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVOC) for regulated products, including heat pumps and air conditioners, before shipment to Kenya. A KEBS-approved inspection body must inspect and test the goods at the origin country and issue a Certificate of Conformity (CoC). Goods arriving at Kenyan ports without a valid PVOC CoC will be detained, re-inspected at the importer's cost, or refused entry. The PVOC inspection verifies conformity to the applicable Kenya Standard (KS), including KS IEC 60335-2-40 for safety. The KEBS Diamond Mark of Quality may be required for locally marketed products. CCC certification from China is not recognised as equivalent to PVOC.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚标准局（KEBS）要求受管制产品（包括热泵和空调器）在发货至肯尼亚前，必须完成出口前符合性验证（PVOC）。KEBS认可的检验机构须在出口国对货物进行检验和测试，并签发符合性证书（CoC）。抵达肯尼亚港口时不具备有效PVOC符合性证书的货物将被扣押、由进口商自费重新检验或被拒绝入境。PVOC检验核实货物符合适用肯尼亚标准（KS），包括安全方面的KS IEC 60335-2-40。在本地销售的产品可能需要KEBS钻石品质标志。中国的CCC认证不被认可为PVOC的等效证明。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞標準局（KEBS）要求受管制產品（包括熱泵和空調器）在發貨至肯尼亞前，必須完成出口前符合性驗證（PVOC）。KEBS認可的檢驗機構須在出口國對貨物進行檢驗和測試，並簽發符合性證書（CoC）。抵達肯尼亞港口時不具備有效PVOC符合性證書的貨物將被扣押、由進口商自費重新檢驗或被拒絕入境。PVOC檢驗核實貨物符合適用肯尼亞標準（KS），包括安全方面的KS IEC 60335-2-40。在本地銷售的產品可能需要KEBS鑽石品質標誌。中國的CCC認證不被認可為PVOC的等效證明。

standards_or_laws: KEBS PVOC Programme — Regulated Products List
KS IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety of heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers)
KEBS Diamond Mark of Quality scheme

summary.en: China requires CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for heat pumps and air conditioners sold domestically, based on GB 4706.32 and GB 4343.1 for safety and EMC. CCC certificates issued by Chinese certification bodies cover only the domestic Chinese market and are not accepted as evidence of conformity for KEBS PVOC purposes.
summary.zh: 中国要求在国内销售的热泵和空调器取得CCC（中国强制认证），依据GB 4706.32和GB 4343.1进行安全和电磁兼容认证。中国认证机构签发的CCC证书仅覆盖中国国内市场，不被接受为KEBS PVOC符合性证据。
summary.zht: 中國要求在國內銷售的熱泵和空調器取得CCC（中國強制認證），依據GB 4706.32和GB 4343.1進行安全和電磁相容認證。中國認證機構簽發的CCC證書僅覆蓋中國國內市場，不被接受為KEBS PVOC符合性證據。

gap.en: CCC does not substitute KEBS PVOC. Chinese exporters must engage a KEBS-approved inspection body in China before shipment to obtain a Certificate of Conformity against the applicable KS standard. Failure to obtain PVOC is a critical compliance failure — goods will be detained at Nairobi port. Lead times for PVOC inspection must be factored into the export schedule.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代KEBS PVOC。中国出口商必须在发货前在中国境内联系KEBS认可的检验机构，以获取适用KS标准的符合性证书。未获得PVOC是重大合规失误——货物将在内罗毕港口被扣押。PVOC检验的前置时间必须纳入出口计划。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代KEBS PVOC。中國出口商必須在發貨前在中國境內聯繫KEBS認可的檢驗機構，以獲取適用KS標準的符合性證書。未獲得PVOC是重大合規失誤——貨物將在內羅畢港口被扣押。PVOC檢驗的前置時間必須納入出口計劃。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PVOC Certificate of Conformity required before shipment for regulated products including heat pumps and air conditioners
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC for domestic Chinese market; CCC not recognised by KEBS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Critical pre-shipment gap — KEBS PVOC Certificate of Conformity is mandatory before export; CCC is not accepted; goods without valid PVOC will be detained at Nairobi port.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 关键装船前差距——KEBS PVOC符合性证书在出口前为强制要求；CCC不被接受；无有效PVOC的货物将在内罗毕港口被扣押。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 關鍵裝船前差距——KEBS PVOC符合性證書在出口前為強制要求；CCC不被接受；無有效PVOC的貨物將在內羅畢港口被扣押。
